evidence.claim: Exact published release closure; production_release is false and legacy_default is true.
Cross-language fixtures passed experimentally; authentication, product evidence, durable ACK, and cutover gates remain open.

products.notes: The alpha.4 source tree is a development target until an immutable v0.1.0-alpha.4 tag and release bundle exist.

evidence.claim: The checked-in complete-consumer lock pins v0.1.0-alpha.3 and explicitly claims distribution-only conformance.

products.notes: The matrix pins the public AetherEdge commit containing the lock; the lock itself identifies only the contract release and distribution evidence. No published alpha.4 adoption or end-to-end product gate is claimed.

evidence.claim: The checked-in complete-consumer lock pins v0.1.0-alpha.3 and explicitly claims distribution-only conformance.

products.notes: The matrix pins the public AetherCloud commit containing the lock; the lock itself identifies only the contract release and distribution evidence. Candidate alpha.4 files are not a published release or a passed product gate.
